stemHtml:
An aircraft plans to route over the Annapurna I at FL300, which is considered the most economical cruising level. 
Determine the approximate minimum terrain clearance at FL300 given the following data: 

Highest terrain elevation along the planned route: 26 545 ft 
Outside air temperature at FL300: -62°C 
QNH at a nearby airfield close to sea level: 982 hPa
